ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A regular expression for headings of sections to pull to the side column
ast.target: 用于将章节标题提取到侧栏的正则表达式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If turned on, then in recipes that have a "# Level one heading", there should only be one – and it will be used as the recipe title. Turn this on if you usually start your notes with a level one heading that matches the filename, and turn it off if you would ever use headings like "# Ingredients", "# Directons", etc.
ast.target: 如果开启，那么在包含“# 一级标题”的食谱中只能有一个，它将用作食谱标题。如果你通常用与文件名匹配的一级标题开始笔记，请开启；如果你会使用诸如“# Ingredients”“# Directons”等标题，请关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: More options are available using the style settings plugin.
ast.target: 使用样式设置插件可获得更多选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, fractions will appear like e.g. "½ cup". If off, they will appear like e.g. "1/2 cup".
ast.target: 开启时，分数将显示为例如“½ cup”。关闭时，将显示为例如“1/2 cup”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Recipe cards shown wider than this view will switch to two-column layout.
ast.target: 食谱卡片显示宽度超过此视图时将切换为双栏布局。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Treat level one heading as filename
ast.target: 将一级标题视为文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Render fractions in quantities as unicode
ast.target: 数量中的分数使用 Unicode 显示

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Maximum pixel width for single-column view
ast.target: 单列视图的最大像素宽度

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle between recipe card and markdown
ast.target: 在食谱卡片和 Markdown 之间切换
